title: Smooth Fonts 32x
description: Smooth Font is a clean custom font resource pack that replaces the default Minecraft font with a modern and more readable style while keeping the vanilla feel. It improves UI text clarity, refines chat and menu appearance, and works smoothly.
body:
![OVERVIEW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e9032ee9b3fb90c8787f2d6a557b2308df8b24c.png)
This font pack gives Minecraft a cleaner, smoother look with better spacing and easy readability. The characters feel modern without drifting too far from the original style. It blends naturally into menus, chat, and the UI, keeping everything subtle, balanced, and visually satisfying.
